creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Matthew,

thanks for submitting this update, however I have a problem with the size of the
archive which does not correspond to what's found in distinfo. See for example
this tinderbox log:

https://redports.org/~culot/20120321094038-26109-16674/scamper-20111202a.log

Do you know if the tarball was regenerated after you submitted your PR and if
yes, why?

Regards,
Frederic
